output: {"match_id": "m007", "winner": "B", "rationale": "Both seeds target stale-distrust redundant re-reads, but B discriminates more strongly on the target dimension per pilot means (redundant_tool_invocation 4.3 vs 3.2; stale_context_recall 3.2 vs 1.4; context_attribution 2.6 vs 1.3).
